title: Enable Istio Sidecar Injection
description:
## Enable Istio Sidecar Injection

For a pod to join the Istio mesh, its namespace must have automatic sidecar injection enabled. Istio then automatically injects the `istio-proxy` (Envoy) container alongside every new pod in that namespace.

**Your task:**

Create a namespace called `mesh-app` and label it so that Istio automatically injects sidecars into all pods deployed there.

```bash
# Verify:
kubectl get namespace mesh-app --show-labels
```

hints.title: The sidecar injection label
hints.body: Istio watches for the label `istio-injection=enabled` on a namespace. When present, the mutating webhook automatically adds the istio-proxy container to new pods.

hints.title: Full command sequence
hints.body: First create the namespace, then apply the label in one or two steps.
hints.command: kubectl create namespace mesh-app && kubectl label namespace mesh-app istio-injection=enabled

validation.description: Check that namespace mesh-app exists and has the sidecar injection label
